---
name: Plugin Proposal
about: Propose a new plugin for DevLauncher
title: '[PLUGIN] '
labels: plugin, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Plugin Name
What should this plugin be called?

## Description
What does this plugin do?

## Use Case
Why would developers want this plugin?

## Commands
What commands will this plugin provide?

Example:
- `mycommand <args>` - Does something cool
- `another <args>` - Does something else

## Permissions Required
What permissions does this plugin need?

- [ ] Internet
- [ ] Storage
- [ ] Shell Access
- [ ] System Info
- [ ] Other: ___

## UI Components
Does this plugin need UI? Describe it.

## Implementation Plan
How would you implement this?

## Similar Tools
Are there similar tools/plugins in other launchers?

## I Want to Build This
- [ ] Yes, I want to implement this plugin
- [ ] No, just proposing the idea

## Additional Context
Any other context, mockups, or examples.
